title: Infosys Names Carlos Alcaraz as Global Brand Ambassador
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a multi-year partnership with tennis player Carlos Alcaraz, naming him Global Brand Ambassador. The collaboration includes using Infosys Topaz to develop AI-powered match analytics and a personalized performance application for Alcaraz and his coaching team, plus joint technology-for-good initiatives with the Carlos Alcaraz Foundation.

key_facts.fact: Infosys announced a multi-year partnership with Carlos Alcaraz, welcoming him as its Global Brand Ambassador.
key_facts.section_heading: 7-Time Grand Slam Champion Carlos Alcaraz is Infosys Global Brand Ambassador

key_facts.fact: Infosys will work with Alcaraz and his coaching team to develop AI-powered match analytics and a personalized performance application using Infosys Topaz.

partnerships_or_deals.description: Infosys announced a multi-year partnership with Carlos Alcaraz, naming him Global Brand Ambassador.
partnerships_or_deals.section_heading: 7-Time Grand Slam Champion Carlos Alcaraz is Infosys Global Brand Ambassador

important_text_spans.text: Infosys (NSE, BSE, NYSE: INFY), a global leader in AI-first business consulting and technology services, today announced a multi-year partnership with the youngest athlete ever to achieve the World No. 1 ranking in men's tennis Carlos Alcaraz, welcoming him as its Global Brand Ambassador.
important_text_spans.section_heading: 7-Time Grand Slam Champion Carlos Alcaraz is Infosys Global Brand Ambassador
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the main event, counterparty, and duration.

important_text_spans.text: Leveraging Infosys Topaz, an AI-first offering powered by generative and agentic AI technologies, Infosys will now work with Alcaraz and his coaching team to develop an AIpowered match analytics and a personalized performance application to aid match preparation and ingame strategy.
important_text_spans.section_heading: 7-Time Grand Slam Champion Carlos Alcaraz is Infosys Global Brand Ambassador
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the technology and product-use aspect of the partnership.
